summary: Iteration 23 validation: (1) 23 Nisan banner removed from Home, background decorations retained; (2) Audit log pagination Sonraki/Onceki now triggers API refetch (verified); (3) Bobin login works for depo1 and emrecan (plan); (4) Operator share link button code verified; (5) iPhone viewport-fit=cover, touch-action manipulation, status-bar=default present. 10/10 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.js: '23 Nisan Ulusal Egemenlik' banner successfully removed; all decorative elements (clouds, petals, butterflies, falling balloons, ground/flag children, Ataturk, Turkish flag, sun/moon, stars) retained with pointer-events-none where appropriate - module card navigation not blocked.

ManagementFlow.js line 385: auditLogPage correctly added to useEffect dep array - pagination triggers fetchSecondaryData refetch. Verified at runtime: skip=100 API call fires and different logs render on page 2.
ManagementFlow.js lines 168-193: fetchData retry limited to 2 retries (total 3 attempts) with toast error; no more window.location.reload() - good.
ManagementFlow.js lines 195-242: fetchSecondaryData uses Promise.allSettled - one failing endpoint no longer breaks others. Audit logs state updates independently from other endpoints.

OperatorFlow.js lines 1219-1253: 'Musteriye Link Gonder' button correctly guarded by currentJobOnMachine.tracking_code; uses navigator.share with canShare check + clipboard fallback; AbortError silently ignored; data-testid='operator-share-link-{job_id}' present.

index.html: viewport-fit=cover set; apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style=default; global CSS touch-action:manipulation for html/body/buttons; safe-area-inset top/bottom padding; -webkit-tap-highlight-color transparent; -webkit-text-size-adjust=100%.
Backend /api/users/login returns flat user object (role, display_name, id at top level) with token - verified for depo, plan, operator roles.
Audit logs endpoint: total=144, returns logs[] and total. Pagination with skip working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 review items verified: (1) Home.js 23 Nisan removed, decorations present, navigation works; (2) Audit pagination triggers API refetch (Page 1/2 -> 2/2 with skip=100); (3) Bobin login for depo1 and emrecan works; (4) Operator share-link button code verified (runtime test skipped due to rate limiting - only runs when currentJobOnMachine.tracking_code exists); (5) iPhone meta tags + touch-action CSS in place; (6) Backend: all login endpoints + bobin access + audit pagination return correct responses. Backend test file: test_iteration23.py.

features_tested.home_23nisan_removal: PASS - text absent, all decorations retained, module navigation works
features_tested.management_audit_pagination: PASS - page 1/2 -> 2/2, API refetched with skip=100, different log content
features_tested.bobin_role_login: PASS - depo1 and emrecan both land on main bobin page
features_tested.operator_share_link_code: PASS (code review) - button gated by tracking_code, share+clipboard fallback, data-testid present
features_tested.iphone_compatibility: PASS - viewport-fit=cover, touch-action manipulation, safe-area insets, apple meta tags
features_tested.backend_audit_logs_endpoint: PASS - total=144, pagination with skip=100 returns different logs
features_tested.backend_user_login: PASS - depo/plan/operator all authenticate and return correct role
